message:
fix(literature): use correct HypothesisCard field names

- Change `backgroundAssumptions` to `assumptions` in calculateRelevance
- Fix test mock to use `assumptions`, `confidence`, and include `updatedAt`

Fixes field name mismatch between literature.ts and the HypothesisCard interface.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -439,7 +439,7 @@ export function calculateRelevance(
     hypothesis.mechanism,
     hypothesis.domain.join(" "),
     hypothesis.confounds.map((c) => c.description).join(" "),
-    (hypothesis.backgroundAssumptions ?? []).join(" "),
+    (hypothesis.assumptions ?? []).join(" "),
     (hypothesis.tags ?? []).join(" "),
     hypothesis.notes ?? "",
   ].join(" ");
